reviews.review_description: game looked good at first but i dont really see anything uniquein it its kinda like all the other fan games and also i was trying to find glitches that i could later report to the owner and i got to the mod room and then the owner banned me

reviews.review_title: awesome game needs more players tho
reviews.review_description:
this game is awesome, i did a video on it so if the devs see this just know that the channel name is @gidion2everything with a gorilla tag monkey and blue with bananas but this game could use more players and it was really fun trying the lava game mode and i am just bad with horror games. 












also the video is called "i wanna get the CC badge".

reviews.review_title: I LOVE THIS GAME ITS AMAZING
reviews.review_description:
I love this game because it has raising lava, horror, a good discord with 20 member ( THIS GAME RELEASE YESTERDAY) , a cool lobby with a cool computer , and even a working fun zero gravity sadly when I join servers most times there not anyone 😢. But this game will has a good chance to become popular . And this message is being said by glitchyyy ( discord name ) I beta tester not for this game but for about w0 other games 


    Wed, July 16.                                     ( this is also the 1st review:)
